title: Turret Traverse Management
summary: Anticipating target movement to keep weapons in firing arc.
details: Turrets have limited traverse speed and arc. Anticipate target movement and pre-position turrets toward likely positions. Request pilot adjust heading if target is leaving weapon arc. Know your weapon arcs: forward, broadside, rear coverage zones. When multiple targets exist, assign turrets to cover different sectors. A weapon pointing the wrong direction cannot engage.
annotations: Dead zones in weapon coverage are vulnerabilities.
Pilot and gunner must communicate about arcs constantly.
